name: Vortex Flowmeter
shortDescription: For steam, gas and liquid measurement in vibration-prone process lines.
overview: Vortex flowmeters measure flow by detecting vortices generated in the flow stream. They are commonly selected for steam, gas and clean liquid service where process conditions, vibration and compensation needs must be checked before model selection.
imageAlt: Velomac flanged vortex flowmeter on clean background
availableTypes: Insertion Vortex Flowmeter with Isolation Valve

coreCapabilities.title: Steam and gas configurations
coreCapabilities.text: Available configurations can support steam, gas or liquid measurement after checking media, flow range, pressure and temperature.

coreCapabilities.title: Options for vibration-prone lines
coreCapabilities.text: Vibration-resilient sensor structures can be reviewed for process lines where signal quality may be affected by equipment vibration.

coreCapabilities.title: Insertion and large-diameter options
coreCapabilities.text: Insertion and large-diameter styles support larger pipelines where a full bore meter body may not be the preferred configuration.

coreCapabilities.title: Multiple output options
coreCapabilities.text: Pulse, analog and battery-powered options should be matched to the site control system.

technicalData.title: Vortex Flowmeter Technical Data
rows: DN25-DN200: 4.0 MPa; DN250-DN300: 1.6 MPa; higher ratings customizable on request
Piezoelectric: -40 deg C to 260 deg C or 320 deg C; capacitive: -40 deg C to 300 deg C, 400 deg C or 450 deg C
+/-1.0% of reading, +/-1.5% of reading, or +/-1.0% full scale; insertion type: +/-2.5%
Sensor: 12V DC or 24V DC; transmitter: 12V DC or 24V DC; battery-powered: 3.6V lithium battery
Intrinsically safe: Ex ia IIC T2-T5; flameproof: Ex d IIC T2-T5
technicalData.note: Selection note: Confirm final configuration against media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

flowRange.title: Selected Vortex Flow Range
flowRange.note: Selected flow ranges are shown for orientation. Final sizing depends on media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

seo.title: Vortex Flowmeter for Steam, Gas and Liquid Measurement | Velomac
seo.description: Velomac vortex flowmeter options for steam, gas and liquid applications, including flanged, wafer, insertion, wireless and PTFE-body configurations.

name: Electromagnetic Flowmeter
shortDescription: For conductive liquids in water, wastewater and chemical applications.
overview: Electromagnetic flowmeters are used for conductive liquid measurement where moving parts are not required. Selection depends on conductivity, lining material, electrode material, pipe size, flow velocity and chemical compatibility.
imageAlt: Velomac flanged electromagnetic flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Conductive liquid measurement
coreCapabilities.text: Used for conductive liquids where fluid compatibility and grounding conditions can be confirmed during selection.

coreCapabilities.title: Lining and electrode options
coreCapabilities.text: Neoprene, polyurethane, PTFE, FEP and ceramic lining options are available, along with multiple electrode materials.

coreCapabilities.title: Integrated or remote mounting
coreCapabilities.text: Integrated and remote mount configurations support different installation spaces and operating environments.

coreCapabilities.title: Large pipe coverage
coreCapabilities.text: Line sizes from DN4 to DN2400 support small process lines and large water infrastructure.

technicalData.title: Electromagnetic Flowmeter Technical Data
rows: Stainless steel 316L, Hastelloy C, Hastelloy B, titanium, tantalum, platinum-iridium, ceramic
Neoprene: -10 deg C to 60 deg C; PU: -10 deg C to 80 deg C; PTFE: -10 deg C to 120 deg C; FEP: -10 deg C to 150 deg C; ceramic: -40 deg C to 180 deg C
technicalData.note: Selection note: Confirm final configuration against media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

flowRange.title: Selected Electromagnetic Flow Range
flowRange.note: Selected flow ranges are shown for orientation. Final sizing depends on media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

seo.title: Electromagnetic Flowmeter for Conductive Liquids | Velomac
seo.description: Velomac electromagnetic flowmeter options for conductive liquids, water, wastewater and chemical applications with lining and electrode selection.

name: Liquid Turbine Flowmeter
shortDescription: For clean liquid applications with stable flow conditions.
overview: Liquid turbine flowmeters are used for clean liquids in stable flow conditions. Selection should confirm line size, connection type, viscosity, pressure loss and the required output signal.
imageAlt: Velomac flanged liquid turbine flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Clean liquid service
coreCapabilities.text: Suitable for clean liquid applications where flow is stable and the fluid will not damage the turbine rotor.

coreCapabilities.title: Connection options
coreCapabilities.text: Threaded, integral flanged, sanitary tri-clamp and insertion styles support different installation requirements.

coreCapabilities.title: Signal outputs
coreCapabilities.text: Pulse, 4-20mA, RS485 Modbus and GPRS options should be matched to site controls.

coreCapabilities.title: Compact installation
coreCapabilities.text: A turbine meter can be a practical option where the liquid is clean and operating conditions remain within the meter range.

technicalData.title: Liquid Turbine Flowmeter Technical Data
rows: DN4-DN50 threaded; DN15-DN200 integral flanged; DN4-DN80 tri-clamp sanitary; >= DN150 insertion
Stainless steel 304/316; other materials customizable on request
-20 deg C to 80 deg C, 120 deg C or 200 deg C
Temperature: -20 deg C to 60 deg C; relative humidity: 5% to 90%; atmospheric pressure: 86 to 106 kPa
Flange: GB9113 standard; thread: BSPT male thread standard
3-wire pulse; 2-wire analog 4-20mA; RS485 with Modbus protocol; wireless GPRS
Standard: non-Ex; flameproof: Ex d IIC T2-T6; intrinsically safe: Ex ia IIC T2-T6
technicalData.note: Selection note: Confirm final configuration against media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

flowRange.title: Liquid Turbine Flow Range
flowRange.note: Selected flow ranges are shown for orientation. Final sizing depends on media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

seo.title: Liquid Turbine Flowmeter for Clean Liquid Applications | Velomac
seo.description: Velomac liquid turbine flowmeter options for clean liquids with threaded, flanged, sanitary and insertion configurations.

name: Gas Turbine Flowmeter
shortDescription: For natural gas, coal gas, air and compatible industrial gases.
overview: Gas turbine flowmeters are used for compatible gases where line size, pressure rating, connection type and flow range can be matched to the operating condition.
imageAlt: Velomac gas turbine flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Gas-focused sizing
coreCapabilities.text: Gas flow ranges should be reviewed by line size, standard range, extended range and pressure rating.

coreCapabilities.title: Connection flexibility
coreCapabilities.text: Threaded, flanged, sanitary and insertion configurations support different line sizes and installation needs.

coreCapabilities.title: Output and communication options
coreCapabilities.text: Voltage pulse, 4-20mA and optional RS485 communication are listed for integration with site systems.

coreCapabilities.title: Hazardous area options
coreCapabilities.text: Intrinsically safe and flameproof options are available for suitable applications.

technicalData.title: Gas Turbine Flowmeter Technical Data
rows: Natural gas, coal gas, air and other compatible gases
DN4-DN50 threaded; DN15-DN200 integral flanged; DN4-DN80 tri-clamp sanitary; >= DN150 insertion
Stainless steel 304/316; other materials customizable on request
Temperature: -20 deg C to 50 deg C; relative humidity: 5% to 90%; atmospheric pressure: 86 to 106 kPa
Flange: GB9113 standard; thread: BSPT male thread standard
Voltage pulse; 2-wire analog 4-20mA; optional RS485 interface
Sensor: 12V DC; transmitter: 24V DC; local display: 3.0V lithium battery
Intrinsically safe: Ex ib IIB T4; flameproof: Ex d IIB T6

name: Thermal Mass Flowmeter
shortDescription: For compressed air, flare gas, ventilation and stable gas measurement.
overview: Thermal mass flowmeters measure gas mass flow directly and are often considered for compressed air, flare gas, ventilation and multi-component gas applications after gas composition and operating range are checked.
imageAlt: Velomac thermal mass flowmeter options on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Direct gas mass measurement
coreCapabilities.text: Direct mass flow measurement can be reviewed without separate temperature and pressure compensation sensors.

coreCapabilities.title: Insertion and in-line options
coreCapabilities.text: Insertion and in-line installation types cover a broad line size range when process conditions are confirmed.

coreCapabilities.title: Gas range selection
coreCapabilities.text: Flow range depends on line size and gas type, including air, oxygen and combustible gas service.

coreCapabilities.title: Industrial gas monitoring
coreCapabilities.text: Used for compressed air, flare gas, ventilation and similar gas services where stable measurement is needed.

technicalData.title: Thermal Mass Flowmeter Technical Data
rows: Common stable gases; consultation required for reactive media such as acetylene or boron trichloride
Process sensor: -40 deg C to 450 deg C; transmitter ambient: -20 deg C to 45 deg C
Insertion: <= 4.0 MPa; in-line: <= 1.6 MPa; higher ratings customizable on request
4-20mA optically isolated, max load 500 ohm; RS485 optically isolated
Carbon steel, stainless steel, plastics and others
Insertion: stainless steel; in-line: stainless steel or carbon steel
technicalData.note: Selection note: Confirm final configuration against gas type, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

flowRange.title: Selected Thermal Mass Flow Range
flowRange.note: Selected flow ranges are shown for orientation. Final sizing depends on gas type, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

seo.title: Thermal Mass Flowmeter for Industrial Gas Measurement | Velomac
seo.description: Velomac thermal mass flowmeter options for compressed air, flare gas, ventilation and stable industrial gas measurement.

name: V-Cone Flowmeter
shortDescription: For differential pressure flow measurement in larger process lines.
overview: V-Cone flowmeters are differential pressure meters used where process layout, pipe size and pressure conditions must be reviewed together.
imageAlt: Velomac V-Cone flowmeter on clean background
availableTypes: Stainless Steel Flanged V Cone Flowmeter
Carbon Steel Flanged V Cone Flowmeter
Large Diameter V Cone Meter Body
Insertion V Cone Flowmeter with Isolation Valve
Insertion Cone Flowmeter with Isolation Valve

coreCapabilities.title: Differential pressure measurement
coreCapabilities.text: Uses a cone element to create a differential pressure signal for flow calculation.

coreCapabilities.title: Large line options
coreCapabilities.text: Line sizes up to DN3000 can be reviewed according to the application.

technicalData.title: V-Cone Flowmeter Technical Data
technicalData.note: Selection note: Confirm final configuration against media, flow range, pressure, temperature and site details.

seo.title: V-Cone Flowmeter for Differential Pressure Measurement | Velomac
seo.description: Velomac V-Cone flowmeter options for differential pressure flow measurement in process and utility lines.

name: Swirl Flowmeter
shortDescription: For gas and steam lines where compact installation and compensation may be required.
overview: Swirl flowmeters are selected for gas or steam service after checking flow range, pressure, temperature and installation space.
imageAlt: Velomac swirl flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Compensation options
coreCapabilities.text: Temperature and pressure compensation can be reviewed for standard volumetric flow output.

coreCapabilities.title: Compact installation
coreCapabilities.text: A swirl meter can be considered where the process layout requires a compact flowmeter body.

rows: Available for review during model selection.
Confirmed according to meter size, media and operating condition.

imageAlt: Velomac balanced differential pressure flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Multiple body styles
coreCapabilities.text: Flanged, welded, wafer and square duct styles support different installation requirements.

coreCapabilities.title: Differential pressure output
coreCapabilities.text: Selection should confirm the transmitter, pipe run and expected pressure loss.

imageAlt: Velomac flanged ultrasonic flowmeter on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Several installation styles
coreCapabilities.text: Flanged, wall mounted, open channel, energy meter and clamp-on versions support different liquid and utility applications.

coreCapabilities.title: Water and utility systems
coreCapabilities.text: Often considered for water, cooling water and utility measurement where the application supports ultrasonic measurement.

name: Radar Level Transmitter
shortDescription: For non-contact level measurement in tanks, vessels and open process conditions.
overview: Radar level transmitters are used for level measurement where the process condition, range, antenna type and installation space need to be checked.
imageAlt: Velomac radar level transmitter options on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Multiple radar families
coreCapabilities.text: 80G, 26G, 6G and guided wave radar options can be reviewed according to the level application.

coreCapabilities.title: Application review required
coreCapabilities.text: Level selection should confirm tank type, measurement range, medium, process pressure and temperature.

rows: Available for review during model selection.

name: Magnetic Level Gauge
shortDescription: For direct visual level indication in tanks and vessels.
overview: Magnetic level gauges provide local visual level indication. Final selection should confirm medium, pressure, temperature, vessel connection and material compatibility.
imageAlt: Velomac magnetic level gauge product photo on clean background

coreCapabilities.title: Local level visibility
coreCapabilities.text: A magnetic level gauge can provide a direct visual level reference near the vessel.

coreCapabilities.title: Site details needed
coreCapabilities.text: Connection, pressure, temperature and material compatibility should be confirmed before quotation.
